title: Migration-agent feedback event
description: One line in workspaces/<taskId>/feedback/feedback-events.jsonl. Captures a single piece of feedback from a human, agent self-check, or evaluator, with enough context for Step 13 to triage and route it. See docs/evolution-and-memory-design.md §5.1.

id.description: Opaque event id; recommend UUIDv4 or `${taskId}-${stepId}-${seq}`.

stepId.description: Two-digit step id where the feedback originated, or 'task' for task-level feedback with no single step.

type.description: Feedback category. Determines routing: agent_bug→code, comfyui_bug→patch/escalation, missing_feature→ticket, user_preference→rule, data_gap→asset note.

severity.description: blocker=must fix before proceeding; degrade=works sub-optimally; nit=polish.

stateSnapshot.description: Captured environment state at the moment of feedback, for reproducibility.

resolvedBy.description: Commit SHA, ticket URL, or 'wontfix:<reason>' when status != open.

relatedRecipeId.description: If this feedback led to a recipe, the recipe's recipeId.
